Bug / Task Description: When the ring buffer is full and a new item is pushed, the oldest entry is not properly evicted: the head pointer fails to advance, so the buffer keeps overwriting the same slot and a snapshot returns stale or duplicated entries rather than the most recent ones in order. Fix the full-buffer push so the head advances and the oldest item is correctly dropped, leaving the buffer holding the newest items oldest-first.
Commit Subject: fix(ring): advance head when overwriting in a full buffer
